raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation declaring personal autonomy and internal validation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "an internal compass exists and is reliable for guidance",
    "truth can be maintained independently of external agreement",
    "clarity is attainable as a stable internal state",
    "thinking and feeling for oneself is distinct from and preferable to relying on others"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent series of parallel affirmations with no contradictions or logical gaps",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker benefits from reduced dependence on external validation while retaining capacity to integrate accurate external information when warranted",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the speaker equates internal conviction with objective truth, dismisses corrective feedback, or operates from distorted internal signals"
}
